code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut have_positive = false
mut max_val = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut cur = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if in_num
      let val = sign * cur
      if val > 0
        if not have_positive or val > max_val
          max_val = val
          have_positive = true
        end
      end
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      cur = 0
    end
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    sign = 1
    in_num = true
  else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let val = sign * cur
  if val > 0
    if not have_positive or val > max_val
      max_val = val
      have_positive = true
    end
  end
end

if have_positive
  print("max=#{max_val}")
else
  print("none")
end
